'''√th-y-g''' ('''kathayag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debark|debark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debark|debark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-y-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathayag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithayag || jithayag || shithayag || kithayag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthayag || jujuthayag || shushuthayag || kukuthayag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthayag || juthayag || shuthayag || kuthayag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthayag || juthayag || shuthayag || kuthayag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethayag || jethayag || shethayag || kethayag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothayag || jojothayag || shoshothayag || kokothayag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothayag || jothayag || shothayag || kothayag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothayag || jothayag || shothayag || kothayag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thayag || thayag || thayag || thayag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thayag || thayag || thayag || thayag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thayag || thayag || thayag || thayag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thayag || thayag || thayag || thayag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæthayag || jæthayag || shæthayag || kæthayag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathayag || jajathayag || shashathayag || kakathayag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathayag || jathayag || shathayag || kathayag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathayag || jathayag || shathayag || kathayag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shathayag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshathayag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishathayag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shathayagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshathayagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishathayagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shathayagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshathayagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishathayagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shathayagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshathayagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishathayagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shathayagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshathayagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishathayagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shathayagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshathayagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishathayagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shathayagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshathayagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishathayagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shathayagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshathayagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishathayagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shathayagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshathayagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishathayagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shathayagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshathayagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishathayagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shathayagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathayagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathayagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shathayagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshathayagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathayagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shathayagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshathayagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishathayagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shathayagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathayagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathayagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shathayagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshathayagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathayagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shathayagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshathayagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishathayagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shathayagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshathayagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishathayagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shathayagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshathayagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathayagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shathayagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshathayagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishathayagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shathayagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshathayagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishathayagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shathayagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathayagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathayagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
